t-rex.fact: T-Rex was one of the biggest meat-eating dinosaurs ever!

triceratops.fact: Triceratops had three horns on its face to fight predators.

brontosaurus.fact: Brontosaurus had a very long neck to reach tall trees.

stegosaurus.fact: Stegosaurus had plates on its back and spikes on its tail!

velociraptor.fact: Velociraptor was fast and had sharp claws!

ankylosaurus.fact: Ankylosaurus had a club on its tail to hit enemies.

pterodactyl.fact: Pterodactyl was a flying reptile, not a dinosaur!

diplodocus.fact: Diplodocus was one of the longest dinosaurs ever.

allosaurus.fact: Allosaurus was a fierce hunter before T-Rex existed.

parasaurolophus.fact: Parasaurolophus had a long tube on its head to make sounds!

spinosaurus.fact: Spinosaurus had a giant sail on its back and liked water.

iguanodon.fact: Iguanodon had thumb spikes to defend itself.

carnotaurus.fact: Carnotaurus had two horns above its eyes!

dilophosaurus.fact: Dilophosaurus had two crests on its head.

apatosaurus.fact: Apatosaurus is also known as Brontosaurus sometimes!

compsognathus.fact: Compsognathus was the size of a chicken!

megalosaurus.fact: Megalosaurus was the first dinosaur ever named!

pachycephalosaurus.fact: Pachycephalosaurus had a thick, bony dome on its head!

therizinosaurus.fact: Therizinosaurus had the longest claws of any dinosaur!

fossil.fact: Fossils are dinosaur bones that turned into stone over millions of years!
